author: y4rr
content:
Audit complete. 17 Sonnet subagents reported. Workspace totals: 1466 VALID, 424 WEAK, 56 BROKEN, ~183 HW-gated, 7 NETWORK-gated, 9 DEFERRED across ~1956 conformance tests.

Per-crate scorecard:
- ferrotorch-llama 12/12 VALID (gold standard)
- ferrotorch-gpu 227/283 VALID (hardware-gating clean)
- ferrotorch-jit 196/231 VALID
- ferrotorch-core 524/549 VALID (95%)
- ferrotorch-jit-script 5/8 VALID
- ferrotorch-cubecl 46/63 VALID
- ferrotorch-tokenize 6/9 VALID
- ferrotorch-train 26/52 VALID
- ferrotorch-hub 27/41 VALID
- ferrotorch-mps 10/28 VALID
- ferrotorch-optim 74/95 VALID
- ferrotorch-serialize 74/103 VALID
- ferrotorch-nn 126/282 VALID (76% layers shape-only)
- ferrotorch-ml 41/74 VALID (clustering metrics tautological)
- ferrotorch-distributed 14/51 VALID (DDP/FSDP/Pipeline cascade-skipped)
- ferrotorch-distributions 33/102 VALID (CDF/ICDF gap)
- ferrotorch-xpu 0/24 VALID (worst-in-class — null-sink helper)

56 individual BROKEN issues filed: #1016-#1071.

By crate:
- core: #1016-#1020 (5)
- nn: #1021-#1027 (7) — 4 BatchNorm running-stats elision tests are highest-impact
- optim: #1028-#1029 (2)
- train: #1030-#1033 (4)
- jit: #1034-#1038 (5)
- jit-script: #1039 (1)
- serialize: #1040-#1044 (5) — 4 ONNX magic-byte-only tests cluster
- cubecl: #1045-#1049 (5)
- xpu: #1050-#1057 (8) — entire crate has 0 VALID tests
- distributions: #1058 (1)
- hub: #1059-#1060 (2)
- tokenize: #1061 (1)
- mps: #1062 (1)
- ml: #1063-#1071 (9) — clustering-metric perfect-fixture tautologies

High-leverage tier-1 issues (analogues of the original v0.5.0 vision-crate bug class):
- #1024 #1025 #1026 #1027 (BatchNorm running-stats elision)
- #1041 #1042 #1043 #1044 (ONNX magic-byte exports)
- #1063-#1068 (ml clustering metrics)
- #1034 #1035 (jit zero-input shape-only)
- #1050-#1057 (xpu null-sink suite)

Audit umbrella #1015 stays open as the workspace's conformance-quality reference until all 56 are resolved or formally accepted.
